title: azalea subsessilis
intro: Azalea subsessilis, also known as the mountain azalea, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever and respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Azalea subsessilis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory conditions.
